testcase.name: test_socketio_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Socket.IO endpoint check failed: 404 assert 404 in [200, 400] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_file_upload_websocket.py:206: in test_socketio_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Socket.IO endpoint check failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Socket.IO endpoint check failed: 404 E assert 404 in [200, 400] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_socketio_polling_transport

failure.message: AssertionError: Socket.IO endpoint not found (404) assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_file_upload_websocket.py:229: in test_socketio_polling_transport assert response.status_code != 404, "Socket.IO endpoint not found (404)" E AssertionError: Socket.IO endpoint not found (404) E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
